title: elytrigia repens subsp. elongatiformis
intro: Elytrigia repens subsp. elongatiformis, also known as a subspecies of the creeping meadow grass or Elymus elongatus, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elytrigia repens subsp. elongatiformis include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system, making it a potential treatment for various conditions such as arthritis and digestive disorders. Traditionally, Elytrigia repens subsp. elongatiformis is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal supplements and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
